summary: P0 Enhancements Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Bug fix verified, no compilation errors, login works. Fixed 2 critical frontend issues during testing.

features_tested.feature: Bug fix: Resolve Restock Alert modal should NOT appear on page load
features_tested.details: Modal is correctly initialized to null and only opens when user clicks Resolve button. No modal on page load.
Returns auto-fix configuration: enabled, auto_apply_safe_fixes, webhook_enabled, scan_on_change flags
Enables/disables automatic mode. Returns updated config with 'auto_mode' nested object
Webhook trigger for code changes. Returns status (skipped/processing/completed), scan_results, fixes_applied
Scans all error types (frontend, API, login). Returns timestamp, frontend_scan, api_scan, login_scan results
Scans for API error patterns. Returns scanned_files, api_calls_found, issues_found counts
Scans for login security issues. Returns scanned_files, login_issues_found, recommendations
Applies React.lazy code splitting to App.js. Returns files_modified, components_split, estimated_improvement_ms
Analyzes assets for compression opportunities. Returns total_assets_size_kb, compressible_size_kb, potential_savings_kb
Runs all optimizations: code splitting, lazy loading, asset compression. Returns phases object with results
Returns dashboard stats: total_errors, fixed_errors, pending_errors, fix_rate
Returns performance stats: total_issues, optimized_issues, pending_issues, current_score, target_load_time_ms

critical_code_review_comments: RestockAlertsPanel.js: Bug fix properly implemented - resolveModal initialized to null, Dialog opens only when resolveModal !== null
ui_blink_fix_agent.py: Auto-config/enable-auto/webhook endpoints well-implemented with proper state management
error_autofix_agent.py: scan_and_fix_api_errors and scan_and_fix_login_errors properly scan frontend files for patterns
performance_agent.py: apply_code_splitting properly converts page imports to React.lazy, adds Suspense wrapper
TrainingPage.js: FIXED - Moved all useState hooks before early returns to comply with React hooks rules

fixes_applied_during_testing.issue: Duplicate displayCurrency declaration - useState declaration conflicted with useCurrency hook
fixes_applied_during_testing.fix: Removed duplicate useState declaration on line 64

fixes_applied_during_testing.issue: React hooks called conditionally after early return - violated rules of hooks
fixes_applied_during_testing.fix: Moved all useState/useCallback/useEffect hooks before early returns, added conditional check in useEffect

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Bug fix verified, login works, no compilation errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 enhancements tested and working. UI Blink Agent has auto-config, enable-auto, and webhook endpoints. Error AutoFix has scan-all, scan-api, scan-login. Performance Agent has code-splitting, asset-analysis, full-optimization. Two frontend files were fixed during testing (POSPage.js duplicate variable, TrainingPage.js hooks order).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. All features working as expected. The two frontend fixes were unrelated to the P0 changes - they were pre-existing issues exposed when testing.
